name: Mediaco Holding Inc.
business: MediaCo Holding Inc. is a multi-media company that owns and operates radio and television stations, digital platforms, and FAST channels, deriving revenues primarily from radio, television, and digital advertising sales, as well as events, licensing, and syndication.
sellsTo: Multicultural audiences (Black, Hispanic, and multi-cultural consumers)

exposures.sentence: The Company also operates eight FAST channels - EstrellaTV, Estrella News, Cine EstrellaTV, Estrella Games, EstrellaTV Mexico, Curiosity Explora, Curiosity Motores, and Curiosity Animales.

We use artificial intelligence ("AI") in our business, and challenges in managing its use could result in reputational harm, competitive disadvantage, legal liability, and adverse effects on our results of operations.
